intro: Deep in the ruins, a colossal construct sits motionless behind a wall of raised glyphs. It has slept here, sealed, for an age - and something valuable rests in its grip.
title: The Dormant Guardian
description: The seal is a row of raised dots - an ancient Braille. Read it correctly and the wards will recognize you, letting you attune to the guardian and claim what it protects. Misread it, and the construct will wake in a fury. Or you could leave the seal untouched.

1.label: Read the seal
1.tooltip: (?) Decode the Braille glyphs. Right -> attune and claim the relic (no fight). Wrong -> the guardian wakes enraged (a tough boss).
1.selected: You trace the raised glyphs and speak the word they spell...

2.label: Leave it sealed
2.tooltip: (-) Leave the guardian to its sleep. No reward, no risk.
2.selected: Some things are best left undisturbed. You move on.

attuned: The wards glow and go still - you read it true. The guardian's grip relaxes, and the relic it protected is yours.
enraged: The glyphs flare red - wrong word! The ancient construct shudders awake, and turns on you in a fury!
